title: Bal'adan #1081
definition:
Baladan = "Bel (is his) lord)"

 1) the father of Merodach-baladan to whom Hezekiah revealed the riches
    of his treasures
nasbUsage:
Definition: Baladan = "Bel (is his) lord)"

 1) the father of Merodach-baladan to whom Hezekiah revealed the riches
    of his treasures

    NASB:  he has given a son, father of a Bab. king
